results.title: Rep Urges Young Ogoni Lawyers To Reject Cultism, Champion Devt
results.description: The Chairman of the House of Representatives Committee on Host Communities, Hon. Robinson Dekor, has advised young Ogoni lawyers to use their knowledge and profession to drive development in Ogoni land, while calling for a united front against cultism. Dekor, who represents Khana/Gokana Federal Constituency of Rivers State made the call in Abuja when he... The post Rep Urges Young Ogoni Lawyers To Reject Cultism, Champion Devt appeared first on New Telegraph .
